task_completion.description: Place a top-down soccer field and a ball at the corner arc
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax canvas should display a top-down soccer field shape. A soccer ball shape must be visibly placed at one of the corner arcs of the field.

task_completion.description: Arrange 5 attacking players (red) in the penalty area
task_completion.visual_evidence: There should be exactly 5 red shapes or player icons positioned within the penalty area of the soccer field.

task_completion.description: Arrange 4 defending players (blue) and 1 goalkeeper (yellow/green) in the penalty area
task_completion.visual_evidence: There should be exactly 4 blue shapes/icons and 1 yellow or green shape/icon positioned within the penalty area.

task_completion.description: Draw a curved arrow for the ball's path and a straight arrow for an attacker's run
task_completion.visual_evidence: A curved arrow must originate from the ball at the corner and point towards the penalty spot. A separate straight arrow must be present indicating a player's run.

task_completion.description: Add the required title text at the top
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text label must be visible at the top of the diagram reading exactly 'Corner Routine: Near Post Attack'.

task_completion.description: Save the editable file as soccer_tactic.eddx in Documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/soccer_tactic.eddx' or the EdrawMax application title bar showing 'soccer_tactic.eddx'.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as soccer_tactic.jpg in Documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in EdrawMax saving to '/home/ga/Documents/soccer_tactic.jpg', or a file manager/terminal window showing the created .jpg file in the Documents directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application open with active interaction (selecting shapes, dragging, typing), rather than just terminal commands generating files.

integrity.description: The diagram was built from scratch rather than opening a pre-existing completed file
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots should show the diagram in partial states of completion (e.g., field placed but no players yet, or players placed but no arrows).

integrity.description: The JPG was exported using the application's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax 'Export' or 'Save As' menu being used to create the JPG, rather than a generic screen capture tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output paths are exactly '/home/ga/Documents/soccer_tactic.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/soccer_tactic.jpg'. The diagram must contain a minimum of 10 players: 5 red (attackers), 4 blue (defenders), and 1 yellow or green (goalkeeper). The exact required title text is 'Corner Routine: Near Post Attack'. The diagram must include shapes recognizable as a 'Soccer Field' and a 'Ball'.
